904 WHEEL_50_INTRM_CD WHEEL_50_INTRM_CD GG0170R5 Wheel 50 feet with two turns (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's ability to wheel 50 feet with two turns during this assessment period plus the two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance 
03=Partial/moderate assistance
